title: clerodendrum luteopunctatum
intro: Clerodendrum luteopunctatum, also known as the yellow-spotted clerodendrum, is a type of flowering plant native to the tropical regions of Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving coughs and colds, and soothing digestive issues. In herbal preparations, the leaves and stems of Clerodendrum luteopunctatum are typically used in teas, infusions, and topical applications.
